query: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `familyBudget` (`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL, `familyId` varchar(64) NOT NULL, `incomes` text NOT NULL, `expenses` text NOT NULL, `debts` text NOT NULL, `savings` text NOT NULL, `annualPayments` text NOT NULL, `budgetLimits` text NOT NULL, `savingsGoals` text NOT NULL, `installments` text NOT NULL, `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CONSTRAINT `familyBudget_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`), CONSTRAINT `familyBudget_familyId_unique` UNIQUE(`familyId`))
